metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for product design and project planning workflows

plugins.name: requirements-gatherer
plugins.description: Requirements gathering interview and issue creation workflow. Senior product consultant interviews for structured requirements; source-sync mode derives or reconciles requirements.md from repo, docs, URLs, and attachments (drift analysis, no silent overwrites); organizer converts reviewed requirements into GitHub milestones/issues or Jira epics/stories.

plugins.name: visual-design
plugins.description: Visual design system toolkit with UX/usability expert review. Consultant + codebase reverse-engineering (chrome-devtools-mcp for route inspection per those skills). Component-context agent. Design-reviewer: headless Playwright bridge (CI-safe), Nielsen heuristics, diff mode, review-checklist synergy, .agent-progress/ logs. Update-component-index skill.

plugins.name: functional-tester
plugins.description: Playwright functional tests + headless bridge + Lighthouse CLI/CI + axe. No Chrome DevTools MCP. TDD loop (haiku), audits and performance deep-dive (opus, report-only). .agent-progress/ optional progress_log_path.

plugins.name: defect-gatherer
plugins.description: Defect reporting and submission workflow with dispatch contract support. Reporter skill conducts structured interviews, auto-generates reproduction steps via headless Playwright (visual bugs; plugin bridge, CI-safe) or code tracing (API bugs), cross-references requirements, and classifies as true defect, story update, or feature request. Broad trigger coverage: bugs/issues/problems/regressions, change and story updates, and concrete feature requests against existing product (not greenfield requirements). Supports dispatch from orchestrators with page URL (visual) or API endpoint identity (non-visual). Organizer skill submits to GitHub, Jira, Linear, or GitLab with system-native formatting and requirement traceability.
